observations.summary: A wind came and blew everything away, including stones and dust.

evidence.quote: And then... a wind came. It blew everything away. All of it. The stones, the dust, everything.

observations.notes: This event symbolizes a cleansing or removal of all material or physical elements.

observations.summary: After the wind, a single, impossibly bright star appeared.

evidence.quote: And I looked up, and there was a star. Just one. Impossibly bright.

observations.notes: The star likely represents a singular focus, hope, or divine presence following the clearing away of everything else.
